answer.ts.remark: diverged: local adds markdown rendering for question text and context (Markdown component + getMarkdownTheme). Upstream renders questions as plain wrapped text. Also: config (model ID, provider), keybinding system (keyHint vs hardcoded), visual (editor theme, confirmation dialog style)

btw.ts.remark: functionally_same: backported isIdle() conditional delivery. codingTools and replaceMessages not available in current pi version — remaining diffs are API unavailability, config/keybinding/visual

control.ts.remark: functionally_same: backported result.isError check. Rest is config (provider), keybinding, visual, code style

files.ts.remark: functionally_same: intentional removals (3 keyboard shortcuts, quick-diff, findLatestFileReference), added defensive content guard, config (zed vs code), keybinding, visual

loop.ts.remark: removed locally to match upstream ac79012: loop behavior is now folded into session-backed goal.ts

prompt-editor.ts.remark: functionally_same: applied bash status mode-label improvement and cycleMode fallback. Remaining diffs are code style (typed wrappers vs any casts)

review.ts.remark: functionally_same: deliverAs:followUp is an intentional local addition (upstream sends plain), keybinding, visual, code style

session-breakdown.ts.remark: functionally_same: applied faux-provider session skip. Remaining diffs are keybinding system, visual polish (visibleWidth for correct ANSI width handling — bugfix over upstream .length), removed dead code

todos.ts.remark: functionally_same: upstream listTodosSync() is dead code (defined but never called) — local uses async listTodos() throughout. Rest is keybinding, import path, code style (stricter typing)

context.ts.remark: functionally_same: keybinding system, visual, code style (type-safe helpers vs any casts, constructor signature)

goal.ts.remark: functionally_same: biome formatting (tabs to spaces, line wrapping), replaced non-null assertions with return values from setGoalStatus/setGoal to satisfy noNonNullAssertion lint rule

notify.ts.remark: diverged: local uses BEL fallback for Zed terminals; upstream only emits OSC 777
